Washer tank removal (when removing the passenger side front damper)

blocks.text: Front damper removal and installation
1. Lift Set
2. Front wheel removal
3. Stabilizer linkage disconnection (for vehicles equipped with stabilizer)
Disconnect the damper (A) from the stabilizer link (B).

items.text: Hold the joint pin (C) with the hex wrench (D) and loosen the flange nut (E).
Hold the joint pin (C) with the hex wrench (D) and loosen the flange nut (E).
When installing, replace the flange nut with a new one.
When installing, replace the flange nut with a new one.

blocks.text: 4. Brake Hose and Wheel Sensor Wire Guide Rubber Disconnect
Remove the brake hose bracket mounting bolt (A). Remove the wheel sensor wire guide rubber (B) and clip (C) from the damper. Do not disconnect the wheel sensor cord.
5. Front damper lower part disconnect
Remove the damper mounting bolt (A).

items: Note that pulling the knuckle outward too hard will cause the roller of the driveshaft inboard joint to pull out.
When mounting, retain the damper mounting nut (B) and tighten the bolts to the specified torque.
When installing, replace the damper mounting bolts and nuts with new ones.

blocks.text: 6. Relay box removal (when removing driver side front damper)

refs.label: Relay box removal (when removing driver side front damper)

blocks.text: 7. Washer tank removal (when removing the passenger side front damper)

refs.label: Washer tank removal (when removing the passenger side front damper)

blocks.text: 8. Front damper upper part disconnect
Hold the damper rod (B) at the top of the damper with the hexagonal wrench (A) and loosen the nut (C).
Remove the nut (A), wave washer (B) and damper mounting base (C).
9. Front damper removal
Remove the damper assembly (A) from the vehicle body and remove the damper mounting rubber (B).

items: The damper mounting rubber must be removed without prying, as the damper bearing (C) cap may come off.
If the cap has come off, inspect it for damage and reinstall it on the damper bearing.

blocks.text: 10. Installation Precautions
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
11. Wheel alignment Inspection and adjustment
12. VSA sensor Midpoint write
